steps.title: Spot the purpose signal
steps.content: The passage states that “one of their goals was for their female actor friends to have good parts to play.” This establishes a goal waiting to be fulfilled by action. The blank must connect goal to fulfilling action.

steps.title: Apply the purpose signal
steps.content: 'To that end' means 'in order to achieve that purpose.' The other three either restate, summarize, or exemplify rather than express purpose. D is correct.
